ignorePatterns:
.DS_Store
data/**
docs/**
marianas-open/**
oldTaxBusiness/**
api/db/schema.rb
api/Gemfile.lock
web/package-lock.json
**/*.pdf
**/*.png
**/*.jpg
**/*.jpeg
**/*.xlsx
instructions: Prioritize bugs, regressions, security issues, data integrity, payroll correctness, tenant isolation, and edge cases over style nitpicks. Be especially careful around payroll calculations, check printing/alignment, tax handling, imports, and admin authorization flows.
